title: Extra Terrestrial
description: a mod adding 2 new ores, 2 new armor sets and 1 new set of tools!
body:
This is custom mod made with MCreator that adds 2 new ore/material types (Nova and Aurora) that are stronger that netherite and just as rare, they also share a tool set but have their own armor sets. These ores are found far below the surface in the dark caves of the deepslate layer and boast better and more powerful armor and tools.

Aurora is an ore that encapsulates the galaxy and all the stars within it.

Nova is an ore that encapsulates the power lying within the burning stars.

These two ore have their own armor sets corresponding to what they stand for but come together to form by far the most overpowered set of tools when compared to the vanilla set of tools.
